allow: Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where processid=25060 get name,commandline 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -Command "\(New-Object Net.WebClient\).DownloadString\(''http://localhost:3001/api/scenes''\) | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty scenes | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count")
